attributes.action: Create a National Standard for Road Maintenance and Pothole Repair
attributes.additional_details: Road conditions across the UK have become unsafe. Potholes damage vehicles, endanger cyclists and motorcyclists, delay buses and increase costs for councils and emergency services. Repair times vary widely, leaving communities with long‑term hazards. A national standard would set repair deadlines, define dangerous defects, ring‑fence funding, require public reporting and apply penalties for repeated failure
attributes.background: The Government should introduce a national standard for road maintenance and pothole repair, with maximum repair times for dangerous defects, ring‑fenced funding, and a transparent public reporting system so residents can track repairs.

rejection.details:
We have a petition already opened on this subject which you may wish to sign instead:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757761
